text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oooh, Nature, you lied to me again!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Trainer's type doesn't have anything to do
with riding unicycles!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Awww, you got me. Sorry about that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're just so cute when you're angry…
I couldn't help it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? Cute? You think I'm cute?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Geez! Why didn't you just say so!
Fine, I'll forgive you, just this once!
